literal_zh: 你们想想，光美国可能就有上百个基地可以放一台。这些可不是随便凑合的健身房。空军基地健身房里面简直是跑步机天堂，夸张得很。我去那里是为了游泳池游泳，不用那里的健身房，但他们真的有顶级设备。所以负责采购那些设备的人……

speaker: Mark
english: Also — looking online and finding the big fitness influencers, and sending them one as a demo to test out the product, would be a great idea, because that boosts your social media profile and gets your product out there. I'm not a big fan of all these guys who do the fitness thing, because some of them talk more than they do. But finding a fitness influencer who matches what you think — again, I would say Tony Jeffries. I'll get his information. He's a boxer, he owns a boxing gym, and he's a social media influencer. Letting him test one out for you might be a big help, because it would definitely promote your product.
literal_zh: 另外，在线上找大型健身影响者，给他们寄一台样机测试产品，也会是个很好的想法，因为这会提升你们的社交媒体曝光，让产品传播出去。我不是所有健身博主的粉丝，因为有些人说得比做得多。但找一个符合你们理念的健身影响者——我还是会说 Tony Jeffries。我会把他的信息找给你们。他是拳手，有自己的拳馆，也是社交媒体影响者。让他帮你们测试一台可能会很有帮助，因为这肯定会推广你们的产品。

speaker: Mark
english: But definitely look at military, definitely look at law enforcement, firefighters — people like that. Getting it into their gyms. I'm not saying give it away — just talk to them about getting it in there, even as a test. "Hey, if people don't like it, we'll take it back." But I guarantee people will be like, "Oh my god, this is the coolest thing ever." Because it's interactive, and it does the things that a heavy bag doesn't. It interacts with you, and it's going to give feedback.
literal_zh: 但一定要看看军方，一定要看看执法部门、消防员这些人。把它放进他们的健身房。我不是说免费送，只是跟他们谈谈把它放进去，哪怕是测试。“嘿，如果大家不喜欢，我们就拿回来。”但我保证人们会说：“天啊，这是最酷的东西。”因为它是互动的，它能做重沙袋做不到的事。它会和你互动，也会给反馈。

speaker: Mark
english: We love feedback. Guys who train love — I mean, I have 15 logbooks of all the workouts I used to do when I was in the military, where I wrote it down: "Did this many push-ups, did this many sit-ups, ran this far." I kept a logbook, because we want to track our progress, see how we're doing. So having all that digitally — it's going to save a lot of writing.
literal_zh: 我们喜欢反馈。训练的人都喜欢——我的意思是，我有 15 本训练日志，记录了我在军队时做过的所有训练。我会写下来：“做了多少个俯卧撑，做了多少个仰卧起坐，跑了多远。”我保留训练日志，因为我们想追踪自己的进步，看看自己表现如何。所以如果所有这些都能数字化，那会省下很多书写。

speaker: Interviewer
english: Mac, this is extremely valuable. Thank you. Also, we'll be at CES in Las Vegas this January, from January 6th through 9th. We'd be happy to have you come by.
literal_zh: Mac，这些信息非常有价值。谢谢。另外，我们今年一月会去拉斯维加斯参加 CES，时间是 1 月 6 日到 9 日。我们很欢迎你过来看看。

speaker: Mark
english: Oh, I'll come out. Send me the dates, and I'll be there. I'm retired, I've got nothing to do — you tell me when, and I'll show up.
literal_zh: 哦，我会去的。把日期发给我，我就去。我退休了，没什么事做——你们告诉我时间，我就出现。

speaker: Interviewer
english: We'll send you all the details. Can't wait to actually meet you in person.
literal_zh: 我们会把所有细节发给你。等不及真正线下见到你了。

speaker: Mark
english: Absolutely. And if you need anything else, feel free to reach out. You have my WhatsApp — if you just send me a message saying, "We'd like to talk to you some more," I'm always willing to talk, because — in case you haven't noticed — I'm a little bit chatty.
literal_zh: 当然。如果你们还需要其他任何东西，随时联系我。你们有我的 WhatsApp，只要给我发消息说“我们想再跟你聊聊”，我一直都愿意聊，因为——如果你们还没注意到的话——我有点话多。

speaker: Interviewer
english: We appreciate that. One last thing: when you have time, could you send the Nexersys workout video? No rush.
literal_zh: 非常感谢。最后一件事：你方便的时候可以把 Nexersys 训练视频发给我们吗？不着急。

speaker: Mark
english: Yep, the Nexersys machine. And then on Friday, I'll probably go down to Rock Box, and I'll take some photos, and I'll take some video of one of the classes. I'm happy to.
literal_zh: 没问题，Nexersys 机器。然后周五我大概会去 Rock Box，拍一些照片，也拍一个课程的视频。我很乐意。

speaker: Mark
english: That'll be Friday. And I will probably have the Nexersys workout video too, because I've got to get the garage cleaned out. We were working on a motorcycle — I have two custom motorcycles — and we had one completely torn apart, so there wasn't a lot of working out this week. But we got it all back together, so I'm going to get everything cleaned out so I can get back in there and start working again.
literal_zh: 那会是周五。我可能也会拍好 Nexersys 训练视频，因为我得把车库清理出来。我们之前在修摩托车——我有两辆定制摩托——其中一辆被完全拆开了，所以这周没怎么训练。但我们已经把它重新装好了，所以我会把所有东西清理出来，这样我就能回到那里重新开始训练。

speaker: Mark
english: Absolutely — and please keep me posted when you guys are getting ready to launch. I'll definitely come out to Vegas, and I look forward to meeting you guys in person.
literal_zh: 绝对没问题。你们准备发布时请一定持续告诉我。我肯定会去拉斯维加斯，也期待和你们线下见面。

speaker: Interviewer
english: This has been incredibly helpful. You have no idea how useful this is for us.
literal_zh: 这对我们非常有帮助。你可能不知道这些信息对我们有多有用。

speaker: Mark
english: It has been my pleasure, and I hope I helped.
literal_zh: 这是我的荣幸，也希望我确实帮上忙了。

speaker: Interviewer
english: Thank you so much, and sorry we kept you for so many questions. We got a little carried away.
literal_zh: 非常感谢，也抱歉我们问了这么多问题。我们确实有点聊得太投入了。

speaker: Mark
english: No worries. I'm happy to help, because I think what you guys are doing is great. You're producing a product, and you need as much information as you can get. If you can run across somebody like me who's been doing it most of his life — it might help a little bit. So I'm happy to help. Anything I can do, just let me know.
literal_zh: 没关系。我很乐意帮忙，因为我觉得你们正在做的事情很棒。你们在做一个产品，需要尽可能多的信息。如果你们碰到像我这样大半辈子都在做这类事的人，可能会有一点帮助。所以我很乐意帮忙。我能做的任何事，告诉我就行。

speaker: Interviewer
english: Thank you again. Have a great day, Mac.
literal_zh: 再次感谢。祝你今天过得愉快，Mac。

speaker: Mark
english: You too. Everyone — nice meeting you. Bye.
literal_zh: 你们也是。各位，很高兴认识你们。再见。

speaker: Interviewer
english: Bye! Nice meeting you too!
literal_zh: 再见！我们也很高兴认识你！
